case_title: NELSON, WILLIAM RUDOPH vs. CORDINEZ, DAN IND & DBA PACKAKING EQUIPMENT REPAIR

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF NELSON, WILLIAM RUDOPH AS TO DEFENDANT CORDINEZ, DAN IND & DBA PACKAKING EQUIPMENT REPAIR

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NELSON, WILLIAM RUDOPH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CORDINEZ, DAN IND & DBA PACKAKING EQUIPMENT REPAIR $2,211.48 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,291.48
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF ASSIGNMENT OF JUDGMENT & PROOF OF MAIL SER VICE FILED BY PLNTFF
ORDER TO ENTER JUDGMENT NUNC PRO TUNC
NOTICE OF THIRD PARTY ACTION JUDGMENT ASSIGNED AND TRANSFER TO NCCS INC, DBA NORTH COAST COLLECTION SERVICE AND ALL PRIOR ASSIGNMENTS ARE REVOKED FILED BY PLAINTIFF NELSON, WILLIAM RUDOPH
